script.code:
let soData = {{node:get_node_NCJ7taxf.data.data}};

const mapLineItem = (item, record, index) => {
  const lineItemPromise = {
    item_id: item.item_name,
    item_name: item.item_id,
    item_description: item.so_desc,
    amount: (
      parseFloat(item.so_gross) - parseFloat(item.so_discount_amount || 0)
    ).toFixed(4),
    tax_code: item.so_tax_preference,
    tax_percent: item.so_tax_percentage,
    tax_inclusive: item.so_tax_inclusive,
    tax_tariff_id: item.tariff_id,
    tax_amount: parseFloat(item.so_tax_amount).toFixed(4),
    subtotal: parseFloat(item.so_amount).toFixed(4),
    customer_id: item.customer_id,
    area_id: item.area_id,
    agent_id: item.sales_person_id,
    payment_term_id: item.payment_term_id,
    plant_id: item.plant_id,
  };

  return lineItemPromise;
};

const mapHeaderData = (record, lineItemPromise) => {
  const data = {
    payment_status: "Unpaid",
    plant_id: record.organization_id,
    ar_invoice_no: record.so_no,
    ar_invoice_no_type: -9999,
    customer_id: record.customer_name,
    currency_code: record.so_currency,
    description: "Sales",
    ar_billing_address: record.cust_billing_address,
    ar_shipping_address: record.cust_shipping_address,
    invoice_date: new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0],
    area_id: record.so_area_id || "",
    agent_id: record.so_sales_person,
    agent_user_id: record.so_agent_user_id,
    payment_term_id: record.so_payment_term,
    due_date: new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0],
    so_id: record.id,
    table_ar_invoice: lineItemPromise,
    tax_total_currency: record.so_currency,
    invoice_total_currency: record.so_currency,
    outstanding_amount_currency: record.so_currency,
    tax_total: parseFloat(record.so_total_tax).toFixed(4),
    invoice_total: parseFloat(record.so_total).toFixed(4),
    outstanding_amount: parseFloat(record.so_total).toFixed(4),
    myr_invoice_total: parseFloat(record.myr_total_amount).toFixed(4),
    billing_address_name: record.billing_address_name,
    billing_address_phone: record.billing_address_phone,
    billing_address_line_1: record.billing_address_line_1,
    billing_address_line_2: record.billing_address_line_2,
    billing_address_line_3: record.billing_address_line_3,
    billing_address_line_4: record.billing_address_line_4,
    billing_address_city: record.billing_address_city,
    billing_postal_code: record.billing_postal_code,
    billing_address_state: record.billing_address_state,
    billing_address_country: record.billing_address_country,
    billing_attention: record.billing_attention,
    billing_address_fax: record.billing_address_fax,
    billing_address_code: record.billing_address_code,
    shipping_address_name: record.shipping_address_name,
    shipping_address_phone: record.shipping_address_phone,
    shipping_address_line_1: record.shipping_address_line_1,
    shipping_address_line_2: record.shipping_address_line_2,
    shipping_address_line_3: record.shipping_address_line_3,
    shipping_address_line_4: record.shipping_address_line_4,
    shipping_address_city: record.shipping_address_city,
    shipping_postal_code: record.shipping_postal_code,
    shipping_address_state: record.shipping_address_state,
    shipping_address_country: record.shipping_address_country,
    shipping_attention: record.shipping_attention,
    shipping_address_code: record.shipping_address_code,
    shipping_address_fax: record.shipping_address_fax,
  };

  return data;
};

let arLineItem = [];
for (const item of soData.table_so) {
  const lineItemPromise = mapLineItem(item, soData);
  arLineItem.push(lineItemPromise);
}
const arData = mapHeaderData(soData, arLineItem);

return { arData };
